faq.question: Does this mod work with custom or edited recipies?
faq.answer: Chain Crafting asks the game for each recipe and does not hardcode any of them, so it should work fine with any custom or edited recipes.

faq.question: You know EasyCraft exists right?
faq.answer: Yes, i am fully aware, i made this mod to learn, but if you give it a try, you might just enjoy it.

faq.question: What should i do if your mod is incompatible with my other mods?
faq.answer: Please notify me imediatelly, and i'll do my best to figure out a way to make it compatible, tho, i have no guarantees that i'll be able to'.
